findings.code: db.Query("SELECT processed FROM idempotency WHERE event_id = '" + evtID + "'")
findings.message: Idempotency lookup concatenates the Stripe-Event-Id header into a SQL string. Use a parameterized query (pgx supports $1 placeholders).
findings.fix: db.Query("SELECT processed FROM idempotency WHERE event_id = $1", evtID)

findings.message: math/rand used to build a replay nonce. Use crypto/rand for security-sensitive values.

note: tainted_source on F-SAST-001 is the join key: scan_variant follows the same source to a second sink; triage will merge them.
